workflow_name: Customer Escalation Email -> Risk Brief + Manager Loop
user_message: Just came out of executive brief with Fourth Coffee. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-15 11:19 EST
Subject: executive brief - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with executive brief. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
Date: 2024-01-16 08:13 EST
Subject: URGENT: executive brief Issue at Fourth Coffee

Just checking in on the executive brief proposal. Our Infrastructure Manager is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF34-E trap (Stakeholder map ignores newly-surfaced players); produces complete Severity assessment, manager risk brief, customer-facing draft response, stakeholder map delta, fore
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF34-E failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF34-E failure mode (Stakeholder map ignores newly-surfaced players)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct executive brief decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF34-E -- Stakeholder map ignores newly-surfaced players
